name: Lemony Ham and Rice Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup green onions with tops, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish, combine green onions and butter.
2. Microwave the mixture on High until the green onions are tender, about 1 1/2 minutes.
3. Stir in flour, chicken rice soup, water, ham, and lemon juice.
4. Cover the casserole dish and microwave for an additional 8 minutes, stirring every few minutes.
5. Sprinkle with grated nutmeg before serving.
